deep_dive.title: SPEAK: Spatial Prompting with Expert Aligned Knowledge for Tissue Domain Identification in Spatial Transcriptomics
deep_dive.abstract: Spatially resolved transcriptomic (SRT) data requires spatial domain identification to enable tissue microenvironment-specific downstream analyses. Here we present SPEAK (Spatial Prompting with Expert-Aligned Knowledge), a large language model (LLM) -based method to identify spatial domains from SRT data by taking advantage of the prior knowledge from both LLM and human experts. SPEAK constructs a spatial context prompt for each cell/spot based on cell types and marker genes of its neighboring cells, enabling zero-shot inference, expert-guided fine-tuning, and prototype updating through two-stage prompting. Applications to STARmap, Visium, MERFISH and Xenium datasets showed advantages of SPEAK over existing spatial domain identification methods in domain prediction accuracy, robustness to limited prior knowledge, biological interpretability, and capacity for efficient expert-guided fine-tuning with generalizability to other tissue sections.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: LLM-based spatial domain identification (clustering) with prototype updating, akin to active learning
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于大模型的空间域识别（聚类），包含原型更新，类似主动学习
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于大模型的空间域识别（聚类），包含原型更新，类似主动学习
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于大模型的空间域识别（聚类），包含原型更新，类似主动学习
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: SPEAK uses LLM with spatial prompting and expert knowledge for spatial domain identification in transcriptomics, enabling zero-shot inference and prototype updating. Strong relevance to clustering using LLMs.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对空间转录组数据中的空间域识别问题，提出SPEAK方法，利用大语言模型构建空间上下文提示，结合专家知识进行零样本推理、专家指导微调和原型更新。该方法本质上是基于大模型的聚类，原型更新机制带有主动学习色彩，在多个数据集上优于现有方法，展示了LLM在聚类任务中的潜力。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对空间转录组数据中的空间域识别问题，提出SPEAK方法，利用大语言模型构建空间上下文提示，结合专家知识进行零样本推理、专家指导微调和原型更新。该方法本质上是基于大模型的聚类，原型更新机制带有主动学习色彩，在多个数据集上优于现有方法，展示了LLM在聚类任务中的潜力。
